Tenant

Enable or disable this tenant

Admin access required
Tenant management is restricted to administrators.

Tenant status

Disabling a tenant hides its menu from customers. This is an admin operation.

—

Note: the API does not return the current tenant status, so the badge reflects your most recent action in this session.
